methodology.sps_aggregation: Unweighted mean of school 2025 SPS (LDOE file has no enrollment column).
methodology.grade_shares: Raw % for display; empirical-Bayes shrunk shares (m=12) used in educator index.
methodology.unemployment: BLS parish rate when present, else ACS DP03 unemployment.
methodology.health_score: Weighted mean of six 0–100 pillar indices (see health_weights).
methodology.priority_score: Weighted mean of inverted pillars (higher = more intervention urgency).
